lesson.title: I can listen and answer
lesson.subject: Lumo Fundamentals
lesson.readinessFocus: Short answer confidence, listen cue recognition, and turn-taking entirely from bundled offline prompts.
lesson.scenario: The learner practices a fuller first learning loop offline: hear the listen cue, pick the right card, answer a simple ready question, and finish by naming the next action with Mallam.

activitySteps.title: Listen and touch
activitySteps.prompt: Mallam says, Listen and touch your ear.
activitySteps.hint: Model the action once, then pause so the learner can copy it calmly.
activitySteps.detail: Reinforces the meaning of Mallam's listen cue before a spoken response.
activitySteps.evidence: Learner touches their ear after the prompt.
activitySteps.successFeedback: Good. The learner is following Mallam's listening cue.
activitySteps.retryFeedback: Say it again slowly and tap the ear card together.
facilitatorNotes: Keep the action simple and quiet.
Accept a clear copy of the motion even without speech.

activitySteps.title: Pick the listening picture
activitySteps.prompt: Tap the picture that means listen.
activitySteps.hint: Name each picture once: listen, ready, book.
activitySteps.detail: Checks that the learner can find the listen symbol from three visual choices.
activitySteps.evidence: Learner taps the ear card after one cue.
facilitatorNotes: Use one cue only before the learner taps.

activitySteps.title: Who is ready?
activitySteps.prompt: Mallam asks, Who is ready? Say: I am ready.
activitySteps.hint: Tap the ready card and model the answer once.
activitySteps.detail: Moves the learner from recognition into a short spoken answer.
facilitatorNotes: Keep the pace warm and unhurried.

activitySteps.title: Choose what happens next
activitySteps.prompt: Tap the card that says, I can listen.
activitySteps.hint: Read both cards aloud once before the learner chooses.
activitySteps.detail: The learner matches the spoken next action to the correct text card.
facilitatorNotes: This is recognition, not reading mastery.
Repeat both choices once if needed.

activitySteps.title: Say your next action
activitySteps.prompt: Say: I can listen and answer.
activitySteps.hint: Point to the ear card first, then ask for the full phrase.
activitySteps.detail: The learner closes with a complete short learning phrase.
activitySteps.evidence: Learner attempts the full phrase with support if needed.
facilitatorNotes: Celebrate the effort, even if the learner shortens the phrase.
Finish by inviting the learner into the next lesson.
